scripts.dev: concurrently -n marketing,platform -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @anang/marketing-site" "npm run dev -w @anang/platform-app"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @anang/marketing-site && npm run build -w @anang/platform-app
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @anang/marketing-site && npm run lint -w @anang/platform-app
